title: Project plans
description: Ordered work sequences referencing existing block items. Item ordering lives in relations.json with relation_type='plan_item_depends_on' per DEC-0012 (edges-only authoring; no inline depends_on field on plan items). Plan-membership beyond the items[] array is authored via relations.json with relation_type='plan_member'. Plans reside under <config.root>/plan.json and are opt-in via config.json's installed_blocks.

phase.description: Optional PHASE-* within the referenced roadmap.

items.description: Plan items. Each is a reference to an existing block item; ordering NOT in this array — declared via relations.json edges with relation_type='plan_item_depends_on'.

ref.description: Canonical id of an existing block item (issue-NNN, TASK-NNN, DEC-NNNN, FGAP-NNN, FEAT-NNN, ...). Resolved at load time via resolveItemById.
